web.title: So My Country Doesn't Have Paypal OR Stripe : r/Kofi - Reddit
web.description: Kofi only does payouts through those two. Time payments are only good up to 30 days.

web.title: What payment methods are available on Ko-fi?
web.description: You get paid directly and instantly into your own PayPal or Stripe account, no waiting for payouts! Supporters can pay you via PayPal, cards, ...
web.markdown:
Share your latest creations Post updates, ideas, and exclusive content for your fans. [**Create a post**](https://help.ko-fi.com/hc/en-us/articles/360007638073-Creating-posts-Let-s-make-them-shine). Close 👋 How can we help? Popular: [tips](https://help.ko-fi.com/hc/en-us/search?query=tips) [memberships](https://help.ko-fi.com/hc/en-us/search?query=memberships) [streaming](https://help.ko-fi.com/hc/en-us/search?query=streaming) Ko-fi makes it easy to accept payments by connecting your existing or new **[PayPal](https://help.ko-fi.com/hc/en-us/articles/115003980093-How-do-I-get-paid#h_01HTJ5GFTM15TC40HCMXCG7C6N)** and **[Stripe](https://help.ko-fi.com/hc/en-us/articles/360007522474-Connect-your-Stripe-account-and-start-earning)** accounts. Most payment methods, including credit cards and digital wallets like Apple Pay and Google Pay and local payment options, are automatically shown to supporters once you connect. Note Payment methods shown depend on various factors, including your settings, the supporter’s location, currency, payment type, browser, and device. ## **Payment methods with PayPal on Ko-fi** Adding [**PayPal to your Ko-fi**](https://help.ko-fi.com/hc/en-us/articles/115003980093-How-do-I-get-paid#how-do-i-get-paid--0-0) automatically unlocks multiple ways for your supporters to pay. No extra setup required! PayPal is trusted worldwide, making it simple for supporters to pay using their wallet balance, linked cards, or even Venmo (for U.S.-based supporters). **[Connect your PayPal account now](https://ko-fi.com/settings?tab=payment)** and start accepting payments today. | Payment Method | Supporter Requirements | | --- | --- | | ![Visa](https://help.ko-fi.com/hc/article_attachments/25132500320413) | - Valid Visa credit or debit card.
- Issued by a supported bank.
- Active with sufficient funds or credit.
- Payment Type: **Card**
- Supported: **Global** | | ![Mastercard](https://help.ko-fi.com/hc/article_attachments/25132500322589) | - Valid Mastercard credit or debit card.
- Issued by a supported bank.
- Active with sufficient funds or credit.
- Payment Type: **Card**
- Supported: **Global** | | ![Discover](https://help.ko-fi.com/hc/article_attachments/25132493698717) | - Valid Discover credit or debit card.
- Issued by a supported bank.
- Active with sufficient funds or credit.
- Payment Type: **Card**
- Supported: **US & Canada** | | **Most Major Cards** | - Like Diners Club, China UnionPay, JCB, etc.
- Payment Type: **Card**
- Supported: **Global** | | ![PayPal](https://help.ko-fi.com/hc/article_attachments/25132500326429) | - Use the bank account connected to your PayPal account.
- Login to PayPal.
- Choose your bank account.
- Payment Type: **Real-Time Payments**
- Supported: **Global** | | ![PayPal](https://help.ko-fi.com/hc/article_attachments/25132500326429) | - Logged into PayPal account.
- Sufficient balance available.
- Payment Type: **Wallet**
- Supported: **Global** | | ![Venmo](https://help.ko-fi.com/hc/article_attachments/25132500328349) | - U.S.-based user.
- Transaction in U.S. dollars (USD).
- Active Venmo account linked to a valid payment method.
- Payment Type: **Wallet**
- Supported: **United States** | | ![Bancontact](https://help.ko-fi.com/hc/article_attachments/25132493708061) | - Belgian bank account.
- Euros (EUR) currency.
- Active Bancontact card or mobile app linked to a Belgian bank account.
- Payment Type: **Bank Redirect**
- Supported: **Belgium** | | ![Przelewy24](https://help.ko-fi.com/hc/article_attachments/25132493709597) | - Polish bank account.
- Euros (EUR) or Polish złoty (PLN) currency.
- Active online banking account with a participating Polish bank.
- Payment Type: **Bank Redirect**
- Supported: **Poland** | ### Types of payment methods With PayPal on Ko-fi, supporters can pay using: - Credit/debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, Discover) - Wallets like PayPal balance and Venmo (U.S. only) - Bank options such as Bancontact (Belgium) or Przelewy24 (Poland) - Real-time payments from linked bank accounts Learn more about PayPal’s payment methods **[here](https://www.paypal.com/us/cshelp/topic/help_account_personal)**. Connect your PayPal account **[here](https://ko-fi.com/settings?tab=payment)** and start accepting payments today. If you have any questions [**contact us anytime**](https://help.ko-fi.com/hc/en-us/requests/new), we’d love to hear from you! 💌 ## **Payment methods with Stripe on Ko-fi** Adding **[Stripe to your Ko-fi](https://help.ko-fi.com/hc/en-us/articles/360007522474-Connect-your-Stripe-account-and-start-earning)** makes it easy for your supporters to pay their way. From credit and debit cards to wallet payments and local payment options, Stripe helps you give supporters a seamless way to support your creative work. **[Connect your Stripe account now](https://ko-fi.com/settings?tab=payment)** to get started in minutes. | Payment Method | Supporter Requirements | | --- | --- | | **![Visa](https://help.ko-fi.com/hc/article_attachments/25132500320413)** | - Valid Visa credit or debit card.
- Issued in a supported country.
- Active with sufficient funds or credit.
- Payment Type: **Card**
- Supported: **Global** | | **![Mastercard](https://help.ko-fi.com/hc/article_attachments/25132500322589)** | - Valid Mastercard credit or debit card.
- Issued in a supported country.
- Active with sufficient funds or credit.
- Payment Type: **Card**
- Supported: **Global** | | **![American Express](https://help.ko-fi.com/hc/article_attachments/25132500335133)** | - Valid Amex card.
- Issued in a supported country.
- Active with sufficient funds or credit.
- Payment Type: **Card**
- Supported: **Global** | | **![Discover](https://help.ko-fi.com/hc/article_attachments/25132493698717)** | - Valid Discover card.
- Issued by a supported bank.
- Active with sufficient funds or credit.
- Payment Type: **Card**
- Supported: **US & Canada** | | **![UnionPay](https://help.ko-fi.com/hc/article_attachments/25132500338205)** | - Valid UnionPay card.
- Issued by a supported bank.
- Transaction in supported currencies like USD, EUR, or GBP.
- Payment Type: **Card**
- Supported: **Asia** | | **![Apple Pay](https://help.ko-fi.com/hc/article_attachments/25132493717405)**
**Apple Pay** | - Apple device (iPhone, iPad, Mac, etc.).
- Safari browser (iOS 10+ or macOS Sierra+).
- Valid card in Apple Wallet.
- Payment Type: **Wallet**
- Supported: **Global** | | **![Google Pay](https://help.ko-fi.com/hc/article_attachments/25132493720605)**
**Google Pay** | - Supported device (Android or desktop with Chrome).
- Google Pay setup with a valid card.
- Payment Type: **Wallet**
- Supported: **Global** | | ![Cash App](https://help.ko-fi.com/hc/article_attachments/26318243573533) | - US-based supporter (excluding territories)
- Transaction in USD
- Active Cash App account with sufficient funds
- Payment Type: **Wallet**
- Supported: **United States** | | ![Grab](https://help.ko-fi.com/hc/article_attachments/26318378774301) | - Supporters in Singapore or Malaysia
- Transaction in SGD or MYR
- Active GrabPay account with sufficient balance
- Payment Type: **Wallet**
- Supported: **Mostly South East Asia** | | **![Link](https://help.ko-fi.com/hc/article_attachments/25132500342429)** | - Supporters in Stripe-supported countries.
- Valid Link account with saved payment info.
- Payment Type: **Wallet**
- Supported: **Global** | | **![Alipay](https://help.ko-fi.com/hc/article_attachments/25132500344989)** | - Chinese Alipay account or location
- Transaction in currencies like CNY, USD, EUR, etc
- Sufficient funds
- Payment Type: **Wallet**
- Supported: **China** | | ![Bancontact](https://help.ko-fi.com/hc/article_attachments/25132493708061) | - Belgian bank account
- Euros (EUR) currency
- Active Bancontact card or mobile app linked to a Belgian bank account
- Payment Type: **Bank Redirect**
- Supported: **Belgium** | | ![Eps](https://help.ko-fi.com/hc/article_attachments/26318243580317) | - Austrian bank account
- Euros (EUR) currency
- Active online banking account
- Payment Type: **Bank Redirect**
- Supported: **Austria** | | ![iDEAL](https://help.ko-fi.com/hc/article_attachments/26318219607453) | - Dutch bank account
- Euros (EUR) currency
- Active online banking account
- Payment Type: **Bank Redirect**
- Supported: **the Netherlands** | | **![Przelewy24](https://help.ko-fi.com/hc/article_attachments/25132493709597)** | - Polish bank account
- Transaction in Euros (EUR) or PLN
- Active online banking account
- Payment Type: **Bank Redirect**
- Supported: **Poland** | | ![Pay Now](https://help.ko-fi.com/hc/article_attachments/26318369322653) | - Singapore-based supporter
- Transaction in SGD
- Active bank account with a participating financial institution
- Payment Type: **Real-time payments**
- Supported: **Singapore** | | ![PromptPay](https://help.ko-fi.com/hc/article_attachments/26318378777245) | - Thai bank account
- Transaction in THB.
- Active account with a participating Thai bank
- Payment Type: Real-time payments
- Supported: **Thailand** | ### Types of payment methods Stripe on Ko-fi offers a variety of payment options for your supporters, including: - Credit/debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, Discover) - Wallets like Apple Pay and Cash App (U.S. only) - Bank methods such as Bancontact (Belgium) and Przelewy24 (Poland) - Real-time payments from linked bank accounts Connect your Stripe account **[here](https://ko-fi.com/settings?tab=payment)** to start accepting payments today. To learn more about Stripe payment methods, learn more **[here](https://stripe.com/gb/payments/payment-methods)**. If you have any questions **[contact us anytime](https://help.ko-fi.com/hc/en-us/requests/new)**, we’d love to hear from you! 💌 ## **FAQ** **How do I get paid with Ko-fi?** You get paid directly and instantly into your own PayPal or Stripe account, no waiting for payouts! Supporters can pay you via PayPal, cards, Apple Pay, Google Pay, Venmo, Cash App, and local payment options. Learn more **[here](https://help.ko-fi.com/hc/en-us/articles/115003980093-How-do-I-get-paid)**. **Do I need a PayPal or Stripe account before I open a Ko-fi page?** No, you don’t! Head to **[Payment tab](https://ko-fi.com/settings?tab=payment)** and click “Connect” for PayPal or Stripe. You can create one or link your existing one in a few easy steps. **Do I need to do anything to enable these payment methods?** You’re ready to start receiving support as soon as you connect PayPal or Stripe. We automatically enable the most relevant payment methods for you based on your device, location and payment type. If your supporters aren’t seeing a specific payment method, check supporter requirements in the **[tables above](https://help.ko-fi.com/hc/en-us/articles/24482435253661-What-payment-methods-are-available-on-Ko-fi#h_01JHQW1F8E65VAE3SSV2J237P9)**. If you’re still having trouble, **[reach out](https://help.ko-fi.com/hc/en-us/requests/new)** and we’ll take a look. **Can I request a new payment method not currently available?** We love hearing your ideas! Popular requests like direct bank transfer options and Payoneer are already on our radar. Keep sharing your favorites **[here](https://ko-fi.com/survey)**, your feedback helps shape our roadmap. **Does Ko-fi take a fee?** Ko-fi is creator-friendly with a 0-5% service fee. There’s no monthly subscription, so we only earn when you do. Learn more about our pricing **[here](https://help.ko-fi.com/hc/en-us/articles/360002506494-Does-Ko-fi-take-a-fee)**. **What if I can’t get a PayPal or Stripe account?** Right now, we support PayPal and Stripe. However, we’re always exploring new options! If you’d like to see alternatives like Payoneer, Wise, GCash, Payeer, or direct bank transfers, let us know **[here](https://ko-fi.com/survey)**. We’re constantly working to expand payment options to better support creators. #### Table of contents What payment methods are available on Ko-fi? - [What payment methods are available on Ko-fi?](https://help.ko-fi.com/hc/en-us/articles/24482435253661-What-payment-methods-are-available-on-Ko-fi#what-payment-methods-are-available-on-ko-fi--0-0) - [Payment methods with PayPal on Ko-fi](https://help.ko-fi.com/hc/en-us/articles/24482435253661-What-payment-methods-are-available-on-Ko-fi#h_01JHQW1F8E65VAE3SSV2J237P9) - [Types of payment methods](https://help.ko-fi.com/hc/en-us/articles/24482435253661-What-payment-methods-are-available-on-Ko-fi#h_01JHT4H975NGV180HEQSE7056J) - [Payment methods with Stripe on Ko-fi](https://help.ko-fi.com/hc/en-us/articles/24482435253661-What-payment-methods-are-available-on-Ko-fi#h_01JHT4M6Y3YRATK1R3GV5AWTTW) - [Types of payment methods](https://help.ko-fi.com/hc/en-us/articles/24482435253661-What-payment-methods-are-available-on-Ko-fi#h_01JHT59YRWNF9Q4HXS770G7KFZ) - [FAQ](https://help.ko-fi.com/hc/en-us/articles/24482435253661-What-payment-methods-are-available-on-Ko-fi#h_01JHT5DND5YV0JV2GRGYW4873P) tips, memberships, streaming #### Success This is a success block #### Danger This is a danger block #### This is a success callout I'm a success callout! #### Subscribe icon This is callout with the icon

web.title: Stripe global availability
web.description: Once Stripe is supported in your country/region, you'll be able to sell to customers anywhere in the world. AU Australia · AT Austria · BE Belgium · BR Brazil ...
web.markdown:
Chat with Stripe sales


![](https://stripe.com/global)![](https://stripe.com/global)

8 sales reps available


We're here to discuss your business needs.

Chat now with sales

Stripe global availability

Accept global payments, send payouts, and manage your business online.

Stripe is currently supported in the following countries/regions, with more to come. Once Stripe is supported in your country/region, you’ll be able to sell to customers anywhere in the world.

United States](https://dashboard.stripe.com/register?country=US)

Use Stripe Treasury with stablecoins to manage your money globally— [accessible from the USA and 100+ additional countries/regions](https://docs.stripe.com/financial-accounts/stablecoins#regional-support). Payments not supported yet.

Create an account and start accepting payments—no contracts or banking details required. Or, contact us to design a custom package for your business.

Incorporate a US company from anywhere in the world with just a few clicks. You'll be able to open a US bank account, accept payments, and fundraise in two business days.

metadata.twitter:title: Stripe global availability
metadata.og:title: Stripe global availability
metadata.og:description: Once Stripe is supported in your country, you’ll be able to accept payments from customers anywhere in the world.

web.title: Alternative payment options without stripe? - Facebook
web.description: Stripe is not supported in my country and I have only paypal on my website. ... It looks like there are only PayPal and Stripe payments available.

web.title: Can I use Stripe in my country? - Ko-fi Help
web.description: Creators in over 40 countries can use Stripe to accept payments from all around the world. Check if your country is on Stripe's list.
web.markdown:
Share your latest creations

Post updates, ideas, and exclusive content for your fans. [**Create a post**](https://help.ko-fi.com/hc/en-us/articles/360007638073-Creating-posts-Let-s-make-them-shine).

Close


👋 How can we help?




Popular:


[tips](https://help.ko-fi.com/hc/en-us/search?query=tips) [memberships](https://help.ko-fi.com/hc/en-us/search?query=memberships) [streaming](https://help.ko-fi.com/hc/en-us/search?query=streaming)

[Toggle navigation](https://help.ko-fi.com/hc/en-us/articles/360009265834-Can-I-use-Stripe-in-my-country#)

- [Advanced](https://help.ko-fi.com/hc/en-us/sections/11164441728925-Advanced)  - [Advanced FAQ](https://help.ko-fi.com/hc/en-us/articles/11191183524637-Advanced-FAQ)
- [Policies](https://help.ko-fi.com/hc/en-us/sections/11164451228317-Policies)  - [Policies FAQ](https://help.ko-fi.com/hc/en-us/articles/11191462776477-Policies-FAQ)

[Toggle navigation](https://help.ko-fi.com/hc/en-us/articles/360009265834-Can-I-use-Stripe-in-my-country#)

Ready to accept card payments, Apple Pay, or Google Pay? Just [**add Stripe**](https://help.ko-fi.com/hc/en-us/articles/360007522474#disconnecting-stripe-from-ko-fi-0-8) as a payment method. If you don’t have a Stripe account, it only takes a few minutes to set one up.

Creators in over 40 countries can use Stripe to accept payments from all around the world. Check if your country is on Stripe’s **[list](https://stripe.com/global)**.

## My country isn’t on the list!

If Stripe isn't in your country yet, you can still use PayPal to accept payments. See where PayPal works **[here](https://www.paypal.com/webapps/mpp/country-worldwide).**

Right now, Stripe and PayPal are our only payment options. But if there's another payment method you want to see on Ko-fi, we’d love to hear! Just drop us a **[feature request](https://help.ko-fi.com/hc/en-us/requests/new)**.

🔍 Curious about how Stripe works on Ko-fi? Learn more **[here](https://help.ko-fi.com/hc/en-us/articles/360007522474)**!

If you run into any trouble while setting up your Stripe account or have questions, you can submit a support ticket to Stripe **[here](https://support.stripe.com/?contact=true)**.

We're here if you need us. Feel free to **[send any questions](https://help.ko-fi.com/hc/en-us/requests/new)** our way. 💌

## FAQ

**What fees does Stripe charge?**

Stripe charges their regular transaction fees, which can vary depending on your account type, location, and the currencies used. Generally, it's around 3% + $0.30.

For more info on Stripe’s fees, check out their page **[here](https://stripe.com/pricing)**.

**How do I connect my Stripe account?**

Connecting your Stripe account is easy! To find out how to link your Stripe account and start accepting payments, check out our help article **[here](https://help.ko-fi.com/hc/en-us/articles/360007522474)**.

**What are Stripe’s payout wait times?**

When you receive a payment through Ko-fi, the money goes directly to your Stripe account.

Stripe's payout times may vary, usually within 7-14 days after the first successful payment. You can manage your payout schedule in your **[Stripe Dashboard](https://dashboard.stripe.com/payouts)**.

For additional details on payouts, take a look at Stripe's article **[here](https://support.stripe.com/questions/common-questions-about-payout-schedules)**.

**How does Stripe handle currency conversion?**

Stripe will automatically convert payments to your set currency. More info on currency can be found **[here](https://stripe.com/docs/currencies/conversions)**.
